Hi Johan,

Thank you so much for booking with us!

Please just a friendly reminder that the number of guests shall be in accordance with those stated on the booking details and additional guests/visitors are not permitted. This is a building policy set out by the body corporate and is for yours and your neighbours’ privacy and security.

This is a building policy set up by the body corporate. 

We will be in contact two days before your arrival with all of the details you'll need for a smooth check in and a wonderful stay.

We offer reliable and affordable airport transfers and tours. Our drivers can fetch you in a standard vehicle or shuttle. . Please let us know if you would like any transfers and/or tours during your stay. Please just let us know if you are interested and we can quote accordingly. 

If you would like to get in touch, and have any questions before or during your stay, we request that you use this message platform to message us. This will result in an immediate response during our working hours of 8am – 10pm daily. Please note that the number provided on Airbnb for us will not work as this is my private number and set to do not disturb. Hence, I am unable to assist and be contactable by phone. However, I have a dedicate online guest communication centre who will respond to you during the hours mentioned. If you have a critical issue – please message here with the issue and request for urgent assistance. If the online team cannot assist via a reply message immediately, they will send you my number for urgent assistance as well as warn me to expect the call so I can make myself available.

4. ID / PASSPORT NUMBER - The building only accepts South African ID, South African drivers license or foreign/South African passports.

Looking forward to hosting you :)

Kind Regards,

The Starhost Team

Hi Johan

It was a pleasure hosting you. I have left you a 5 star review online.

I wrote the following
"Johan T spent a few nights in our apartment and was a wonderful guest. The communication with us was great - always polite, friendly and quick. The apartment was looked after and kept clean and tidy as it was found. It was a pleasure to host Johan T and I would definitely recommend Johan T as a guest to anyone."

When rating us after your stay, please consider that Airbnb’s ratings are totally different than the classic hotel star rating system. You should know that Airbnb can close down a listing that drops below an average of 4.3 stars. There system is rather confusing. To give you a better understanding, we designed the following (cheeky) guide to the rating system:
***** (5 stars) = perfection does not exist, but considering what I paid and where I stayed, I was happy here.
**** (4 stars) = several issues need to be improved.
*** (3 stars) = major problems
** (2 stars) = close the place down
* (1 stars) = put the hosts in jail
We always strive to give our guests a 5 star experience. Please let us know of any problem you may have had during your stay and we will do everything within our power to solve it for future.

We hope to hear from you again soon.

The Starhost Team

1545513004.message:
Dear Johan, 

Thank you so much for choosing to stay in our apartment we are so excited to host you!  Here is some information that you will find useful. Please read this carefully. 

GETTING TO THE APARTMENT
The apartment is located at the building called THE VANTAGE which is situated on 23, Tyrwhitt Avenue in Rosebank. You are welcome to reach out to us for detailed instructions on how to get to the building. 

ABOUT THE NEIGHBOURHOOD
The area around THE VANTAGE is safe and secure and is a less than a 2 minute walk from the Rosebank mall which has banks, restaurants, a movie theatre and lots more (including a Starbucks just up the road from the apartment).

CHECK IN
The check-in time is from 14:00, but please do let us know your expected time of arrival.  We welcome guests personally through a team on site between 14:00 and 20:00 hours.  Our team member will show you the facilities of the apartment.  Should you be reaching after 20:00, please reach out to us and make prior arrangements at least 24 hours in advance.  
Kindly note that as per building rules, you will be required to present proof of identification at check in that includes guests & your visitors.  The acceptable identification is a South African bar coded ID Book or Card, a Government issued Drivers License or an International Passport. A copy of this document will be taken and handled as per legal requirements.

CHECK OUT
The check out time is strictly till 10:00.
  
HOUSE RULES
Please note that the building is a residential premises and guests are required to adhere to the building rules.  At check in, you should familiarize yourselves with the rules.  You will be required to accept these rules at the electronic check in station.  We would be happy to provide you with a copy should you require.  The visitors to the apartment will also have to adhere to the check in procedures.
Amongst others, the following are the important rules that you have to abide by (and are a condition of your booking with us)-
1.	Maximum 2 guests per one bedroom plus a maximum of 2 visitors during visiting hours.
2.	Maximum 4 guests per two bedroom plus a maximum of 2 visitors during visiting hours.
3.	The visitors can only be present in the apartment from 08:00 till 21:00 hours.
4.	No loud music, TV or any form of noise.
5.	No parties are allowed either inside the apartment or on corridors. 
6.	No consumption of alcohol in common areas of the building.
7.	Due to the current Pandemic, all Government COVID regulations have to be followed. 

Failure to adhere to the above will result in eviction.  In case you are evicted, no refund will be provided and in addition a building fine amount will be charged. 

A detailed check in message will be sent to you on the morning of your arrival by 10 AM.  

In the meantime, should you have any further questions/clarifications regarding the apartment or the neighborhood or generally about Johannesburg, please feel free to write to me. 

Always happy to help!

Kind regards,
Poonam and Team

Dear Johan,

Kindly note that Eskom, our electricity provider, is currently implementing load shedding. 
The property is equipped with a generator, but the frequency of the load shedding has put a strain on the generator and at times wont be able to handle the load. 

Should the building's generator fail we will inform you. 

We apologise for any inconvenience that may be caused. 

Yours Sincerely, 
Poonam & Team

DRIVING TO THE BUILDING

DROPPED OFF AT THE BUILDING OR WALKING TO BUILDING

CHECK IN PROCESS ONCE AT SECURITY DESK

1.	Please mention to the guard on duty that you have booked with Poonam’s AirBnb along with the unit number.
2.	Please message us on this platform mentioning you are at the security desk so that a friendly team member can come down to assist you. 
3.	You will be required to fill in all relevant particulars into the electronic check in station as per legal and building requirements.
4.	Once filled in the team member will check you into the apartment. The team member will also show you the facilities and answer any questions you may have. 
5.	The Team member will leave a set of keys along with an access gate tag. You will be required to leave these in the lockbox at check out. The code will be sent to you on the evening prior to your departure. 

Your communication will be vital in ensuring that your check-in is smooth and swift.

Poonam and Team

1812845972.message: Hi can you please advise if you have any pref offers on this unit? Many thanks, Johan.

Hello Johan T,

Thank you so much for booking our place at 16 Bree Street 16 on Bree for 2 nights from 15 May 2024 to 17 May 2024. We look forward to hosting you!

Kindly note that we do not accept third party bookings without prior consent. If you are booking on behalf of other travellers, please let us know right away. 

By selecting a Sustainable Stay, you join a community of ecoconscious travellers with a passion for supporting the environment and local communities. We love what we do and our beautiful City, Cape Town. We welcome you to share our passion and experience our 5* service for a truly memorable visit. 

Details of your accommodation: 
Building Name : 16 on Bree 
Apartment : #2205, 22nd floor, accessed via elevators 
Location: 16 Bree Street, Cape Town Central, 8000 
Parking : Secure basement bay 630 
Check-in Time : 3-7pm 
Check-Out Time : 10am 

Should you require an early or after-hours check-in, please advise us and we'll confirm whether possible. This may attract a fee.
 
This apartment is self-serviced, with complimentary cleaning and linen change provided weekly for guests staying longer than 7 nights. Should you need more regular servicing, this can be arranged at an extra charge of R450 per day, subject to our housekeeping team's availability. 

All your reservation details can be found here: https://dashboard.hostaway.com/v3/guestPortal/reservations/27912697/43840effe8ba202e4382339843c43fb0c763144f176bb54c4047e15db4190c94 

We'll be in touch again closer to the time with further information. In the meanwhile, please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or concerns. 

Warm regards 
 
Megan & Cormarie 
Sustainable Stays Team

Dear Johan

We ask all guests staying with us to abide by two sets of rules: the building rules, and the Sustainable Stays guest policy. If you have any questions or concerns regarding these rules, please contact us ahead of check-in. If we don't hear from you, we will assume you agree to abide by them.

BUILDING RULES
 1. COMMUNAL SWIMMING POOL AND ENTERTAINMENT AREAS 
 a. No alcohol is to be consumedin the communal swimming pool. 
b. No glass bottles or containers are allowed in the swimming pool area. 
c. No swimming is permitted before 07h00 and after 21h00. 
d. Parents are responsible for the safety and conduct of theirchildren in the common facilities, and children under the age of 16 shall be accompanied by an adult. 
e. Littering is not permitted, and all refuseis to be removed from the common facilities. 
f. Only conventional swimwear must be worn in the common facilities. Swimming or sunbathing in the nude or underwear is strictly prohibited. 
g. No unruly games are permitted in the common facilities. 
h. No diving is permitted in the communal swimming pool. 
i. No animals are allowedin the common facilities. 
j. No bicycles, tricycles, go-karts, skateboards, roller skatesetc are permitted in the common facilities. 
k. An owner, occupier and/ortenant must not create noise likely to interfere with the peaceful enjoyment of another section or another person's peaceful enjoyment of the common property. 
l. Excessive noise must be avoided from 00:00 to 07:00 daily, and between 22:00 to 07:00 on Sundays and public holidays. 
m. Radios, musical instruments, CD players, record players, television sets, etc., must be used in such a manner so as not to be heard in adjoining units or on the common property. 
n. Power tools and other noise-producing equipmentif operated outsidethe times stipulated above must cause minimum nuisance to other guests. 
 
2. REFUSE DISPOSAL 
a. Refuse and recycling should be disposed of in the bins provided near the elevator lobby on each floor. 
b. No recycling or refuse should be left in common areas. 
 
3. PARKING 
a. Guests should only use the allocated parking bay assigned to them by the host. 
 
4. NOISE AND NUISANCE 
 a. No noise after 22h00, whilst quiet must be maintained between the hours 24h00 and 07h00. 
b. All television, radio, and other appliances emitting sound, includingmusical instruments, must be
kept at audio levels which are reasonable. 
c. No animials, reptiles, or birds are allowed in any apartment or common area.
d. Guests shall not hang washing or laundry on balconies so as to be visible from the outside. 
e. No person/s may smoke any tobacco product, including electronic or similar smoking devices, including legalised marijuana, as it is strictly prohibited in the apartment and common areas. 


SUSTAINABLE STAYS GUEST POLICY
1. As part of our commitment to social sustainability, we advocate for societies in which communities can live free of crime and hatred,
including gender-based violence, crimes towards children, terrorist activity and discriminatory behaviour. 

2. We cannot accept bookings from guests that have a record of serious criminal activities or that we feel present a danger to other residents in the building, our staff or the property. 

3. We reserve the right to reject or cancel bookings from, and revoke all access for, persons that are found to have declared incorrect or
misleading information as part of their booking process. 

4. We reserve the right to cancel bookings should any of our staff feel threatened, disrespected or suffer harm at the hands of a guest or
those accompanying them, or that guest is found to have violated the Airbnb conduct rules, the building’s conduct rules, our own House Rules or the conditions of this Policy, all of which are made available to the guest prior to check in. 

5. We require the guest staying in the space to accept responsibility for their travel companions and visitors and require that the
guest providing the check in information to make these informed declarations on behalf of persons in the party staying in or visiting the space. 

6. By proceeding with this booking, the main guest hereby warrants that none of the persons in the group: 
· have been found guilty of serious or ‘contact’ crimes; 
· have a history of abusive or violent conduct; 
· knowingly engage in serious illegal activities; 
· are flagged on terrorism, criminal and / or predatory watchlists; or 
· present a danger to the property and / or the other guests and residents the building. 

7. The party accepts that any contravention, perceived or otherwise, of this Policy or its referenced rules (the “Incidents”), may lead to: 
· the immediate cancellation of the booking without refund; 
· immediate revocation of access to the building and / or the space; 
· imposition of monetary penalties in respect of damages caused, costs incurred and / or other due recoveries in respect of the Incidents; 
· further enforcement action; 
· reporting of the Incident(s) as well as the persons involved to other professional bodies, statutory / regulatory bodies, law enforcement agencies, the booking platform (e.g., Airbnb), and any other body to whom we are obliged, or feel an obligation, to report the incident(s); 
all subject to the confines of our legal and professional obligations, including those in respect of privacy, confidentiality and protection of information.

Dear Johan

We are currently preparing to welcome you to Cape Town. To assist us with onboarding, kindly provide names and copies of IDs for all adult guests so that we can update our records and notify the building accordingly. Also, please share your WhatsApp number so that we can reach you at short notice if needs be. 

Our standard check in time is 3-7pm. Should you require an early or late check-in, please advise us and we'll confirm whether possible. This may attract a fee.
Ahead of your stay, we will be sending you a unique smart lock door code that will provide you with secure keyless access into the apartment. 

Cape Town periodically experiences rolling power outages, known locally as loadshedding. The building in which you are staying is currently exempt from loadshedding so your accommodation experience should not be affected. 

We will soon be sending you our house rules and policies to accept before your stay. In the meanwhile, please do let us know whether you would like any assistance with logistics, including transfers. 

Warm regards
 
 
Megan & Cormarie
Sustainable Stays Team

Dear Johan,

We’re delighted to be welcoming you today! 

ARRIVAL & PARKING 
Upon arrival, kindly report to the concierge (reception) desk: they are expecting your arrival. You will be asked to sign in and will need to present your ID as identification. If you have a car with you, we suggest you first park in front of the building in Bree Street to complete sign-in. Thereafter, drive around the block to access your dedicated parking bay within the building via Prestwich Street – a one way street accessible directly from Buitengracht Street as you head up towards the mountain. Your bay number is 630. 

Your apartment 2205 is on the 22nd floor, which is accessed via elevators. 

The unique smart lock code for your door is: 4674

Enter this number, followed by the unlock icon, and open the door handle. When you're inside the apartment and wish to exit, press the button and the door will unlock automatically. Inside the apartment, you will find a fob which can be used as an alternative to unlock the door, if you prefer.

WIFI 
Network: StaysAt16oBree_22xx 
Password: StaySustainable<3!

POOL
A pool, bar and outdoor gym can be found on the 27th floor - please do pop by and make the most of this unique experience!

REFUSE 
Recycling bins are provided near the elevator lobby on each floor. Please feel free to sort your refuse accordingly, helping us manage our environmental impact. 

CONVENIENCE 
Your apartment comes equipped with a washer/dryer, along with a drying rack and iron. We’ve provided a few detergent capsules to get you started. If you need dry-cleaning done, we recommend Cape Laundry Online: they collect and deliver across Cape Town. Go to www.capelaundryonline.com. 

For convenient grocery delivery, we recommend downloading the Sixty60 (everyday items) and Woolworths (premium items and prepared meals) apps. Delivery is within hours of ordering. 

Our guidebooks include recommendations for shopping and dining out during your stay. If you’d prefer to eat in, Uber Eats offers a wide range of convenient options. 

AND LASTLY... 
A quick reminder that no parties, pets, smoking, or loud music are allowed in this apartment. Please be considerate to the other residents so that we can continue to host guests like you for years to come. 

Kindly note that this apartment is fitted with a noise, smoke and crowd detector: should any breaches of our house rules be detected, or the device be tampered with, we reserve the right to issue a fine and/or cancel the booking with immediate effect.

We wish you an unforgettable stay – please don’t hesitate to let us know if we can assist in any way. We are on standby to assist 8am-7pm weekdays and 9am-7pm weekends. 

Warm regards,
All of us here at Sustainable Stays

1831976357.message:
Hi Johan,
your place in Vredehoek looks amazing! we are, however, wondering whether bedding and towels are included and if there is a security gate in front of the glass door/main entrance to the apartment? Or is there a fence around the braai space? 
The floor plan also suggests that there might be two entrances to the apartment, one at the back. one at the side?

we are travelling with two kids (10 and 13) and two women so security quite a concern for us..

Warm wishes and many thanks for your kind reply in advance,  Iris

Hi Iris, yes, towels and bedding are included. The front glass door is armored double glass and is impenetrable. There is a security camera and a (locked) gate to the back of the garden / braai area. There are two private entrances, both with armored double glass doors and staircases to the top floor apartment. The area is generally very safe and everyone walks to the Spar & restaurants a block away.
Should you wish to proceed, please forward full names of all adult travellers. Much appreciated, Johan.

As discussed over the phone, if you will cancel a confirmed reservation, you will be penalized for it depending on the reservation amount. However, as what you've mentioned the listing owner didn't informed you why the listing is no longer available, if in the event that it is due to renovation or there's a need for a maintenance on your listing then we can waive the cancellation penalty, given that you can provide to us the following below:

• A timeline of events and actions taken to date to correct the issue

• Estimated timeline that property will be impacted 

• Either a picture of the affected property or a receipt, invoice, or estimate statement of work detailing the issue are satisfactory for proof of documentation

In addition, please be advised that you have 7 days from today to provide us the needed documents for us to waive the cancellation penalty for this reservation. 1909202234.message: Hi Johan, let’s get you help. We’re going to ask you some questions and then connect you with a member of our team.

Can you describe your issue in a few sentences? This will help our team understand what’s going on. 

Please don’t include sensitive info like credit card numbers.
Superhost status
Thanks. Before we connect you, does this info solve your issue?
How would you like to connect with us?
Thanks for your message — you can expect a reply from Airbnb Support within the next few minutes.

Hi Johan, 

My name is Jesiel, a member of the Airbnb Community Support team. I understand you're seeking assistance and I will be helping you with this case. Please allow me a moment to review your case and provide you with the necessary information.
Hi Jesiel..

Hi Johan, we have received your message. However, we were unable to determine the exact nature of your concern. To assist you with this may we please ask for a brief description or more information of the issue that you'd like us to assist you with?

We had a duplicate booking for a two bedroom apartment, which happened right at the beginning of a new hosting partnership. Unfortunately this event now negatively scews my numbers and would delay my superhost status. We have put procedures in place to prevent all future duplications and as you may see our reservations are increasing. I'd like airbnb to consider removing the impact of the host cancellation on my superhost acceptance.

Thank you for the information, Johan. I totally understand that you want to remove the cancellation rate on your listing so that it won't impact your upcoming SuperHost eligibility. Let me check options on how we can definitely help you with this matter.
That sounds great. I have the opportunity to add an additional 10-15 listings and superhost status will expedite this, being beneficial to both airbnb and ourselves.
Please give me 5 minutes as I need to further investigate.
Thank you.

I'm going to forward your case to a member of our team who's in a better position to resolve this for you. 

We understand that this may have caused some inconvenience to you Johan, so we're grateful for your patience.
Okay, much appreciated!
You're welcome.

Hi Johan,

Thank you for reaching out to us. This is Cath, one of Airbnb's Support Ambassadors.

Thank you so much for letting me know with your concern about the request to remove the cancellation rate, and please accept my sincere apologies for the inconvenience this had caused you. I can tell that this is very important to you. Please be assured that I'll do everything to assist you.

Upon carefully checking here, I am so sorry to inform that we are unable to remove the cancellation rate since it is system generated, however, you can lower it down to the passing rate, by accepting more bookings on your listing.

Please let me know if you still have questions, and I'll be more than glad to get back to you.
Okay, thank you for the detailed response...

Hi Johan,

Thank you for reaching out to us and it's a pleasure speaking with you. Again, this is Cath, one of the Support Ambassadors from Airbnb.

I am glad that I was able to help you out through the process and I really wish you nothing but the best experiences with Airbnb. As we conclude, I want to express my sincere appreciation for your time and consideration while waiting for the resolution of your concern. Rest assured, our commitment to your satisfaction remains unwavering. 

For future reference, you can always visit our help center for further information:
How to become a SuperHost: https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/829

Tracking your SuperHost status: https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/1319

I want to assure you that I've thoroughly addressed all your concerns. If you have any additional questions or encounter further issues, please take a moment to review the links I shared with you. I'm confident that they contain the necessary details to resolve any queries. If you need assistance in the future, those resources are designed to empower you.

I'd be closing this thread for the meantime, but just before that, I would really like to thank you for choosing our platform, and delighted that you are part of the Airbnb community. 

Should you have any further inquiries or require assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out at www.airbnb.com/help/contact_us, or call us at +1-415-800-5959 or +1-844-234-2500. We're open 24/7, and we will be more than happy to assist you.

Take care, and happy Hosting!

Hallo Johan, da es morgen endlich für uns soweit ist und wir in Kapstadt ankommen und das Jahr auch zu Ende geht, wollte ich mal nachfragen ob du für uns irgendwelche Empfehlungen für Silvester hast. 
Leckere Restaurant in dem man eventuell einen schönen Ausblick auf das Feuerwerk hat ? 



Grüße 
Philipp

Hi Philipp, I would have recommended Pot Luck Club or Den Anker as to good options with views, but they are unfortunately fully booked. There is a very casual bar at the top of kloof street, called the Dark Horse, it has an open upstairs area, from where you can view the fireworks. There are some good restaurants in the area such as the Black Sheep (https://blacksheeprestaurant.co.za/food/). If that is full there is a very nice indian and steak restaurant within walking distance. Cheers, Johan.
Alles klar danke für die schnelle Antwort, jetzt habe ich noch eine Frage wie es mit der Sicherheit abends/nachts in Kapstadt ist, sollte man da eher vermeiden zu Fuß unterwegs zu sein ?

Hi, Cape Town city is one of the safest areas in SA due to all the video cameras in town. We often walk from the bottom of Kloof street to the top checking out the new places. Long street can be a bit dodgy at times, but Bree Street and Kloof street are where the best restaurants and bars are. There are really inexpensive Ubers / Bolt's everywhere to move you around if your destination is more than a km or two. There are homeless people around, but they are mostly avoidable/harmless. Camps Bay is another great area with bars and restaurants...

Hey Johan, 
ich hätte mal eine Frage und zwar würde wir gerne mal in den Pool gehen, leider ist die Tür immer verschlossen und wir verstehen nicht warum… 

Kannst du uns da weiter helfen oder sollen wir an der Rezeption nachfragen 

Grüße

Hi Phillip, the pool and top floor is run by the yoga studio, that is closed on public holidays. We pay them monthly for our guests to access the pool. Currently it is unresolved for public holidays...
Ok alles klar vielen Dank für die schnelle Nachricht

As such, if your room gets taken up throught these channels, there is no liability on our behalf, to honor your reservation as a substantial period of time to make payment has now elapsed. Thanks, Johan.

1918902372.message: Hi Johan, let’s get you help. We’re going to ask you some questions and then connect you with a member of our team.

Can you describe your issue in a few sentences? This will help our team understand what’s going on. 

Please don’t include sensitive info like credit card numbers.
Thanks for sharing your photo. Please add a brief description so we can figure out the best way to help.
Awaiting payment period means that the reservation would have commenced before payment is received....
To provide the most helpful info, could you let us know which reservation you need help with?
Thanks. Before we connect you, does this info solve your issue?
How would you like to connect with us?
Thanks for your message — you can expect a reply from Airbnb Support within the next few minutes.

Hi Johan, 

My name is Jane, a member of the Airbnb Community Support team. I understand you're seeking assistance and I will be helping you with this case. Please allow me a moment to review your case and provide you with the necessary information.
Okay.
Hello...

Message to airbnb client:
"Hi, our reservations are managed on a hotel management system accessable to travel agents and booking-com. As such, if your room gets taken up throught these channels, there is no liability on our behalf, to honor your reservation as a substantial period of time to make payment has now elapsed. Thanks, Johan."

Hi Johan,

 I do understand that you want to know the status of this reservation of your guest Zama. The request was not completed, and it might be due to the payment didn't go through.
I want the awating payment timne to be reduced to 1 hour for same day booking and commencement.
If this guy has 22 hours to pay, he could have stayed and checked-out with payment still outstanding...
I do understand that you want to reduce the time for same day booking, however the default time is 24 hours by the system and no option for us to customize it.
Can you initiatate a change request for your application developers.
This is interesting Johan in the future since you were right there are some guests who like to book a same day or last minute booking.
I want control of the "Time to wait for same day reservation & commencement"
"Time to wait for payment....."
And now the apartment is blocked for any other guests to book...
This is a major systems flaw...

I hope that the inconvenience you encountered will not be a reflection of the service I have provided you. I sincerely hope the way I handled your case assured you that we take it seriously. This is an interesting feature that may help our Host in the future.

I also would like to direct you to our feedback link. You can use our feedback form to give feedback about how an Airbnb feature or policy works or to report a bug. You can access it by going to this link:

https://www.airbnb.com/help/feedback
Okay provided feedback.
We really do appreciate your feedback, since Airbnb still working to provided better service and platform to our users.
And since you already submitted your feedback, we have a specialize team who look for all suggestions or feedback that we receive.
Okay great...
And Is there any other concern that I can assist you?
There is the question of legal liability for hosting where no payment has been received...
But common law would suggest that we will not give anyone access until payment is confirmed as received.
Is this about other reservation?
No the same....
Yes, you were right. That's why Host only provide there check-in details if the reservation is already confirmed or 48 hours prior to check in.
Okay, thanks for the help, have a good day....

And guest can only see the detailed check-in instructions until 48 hours before check-in or reservation is confirmed. 

You may check the link below as reference on your concern:

Add check-in and checkout instructions to listings
https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/1926

Create scheduled messages and send them to guests automatically
https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/2897

You're always welcome, and It is truly my pleasure to be able to help you. Rest assured that your check-in details will never be disclosed unless if the reservation is confirmed.

If you have any other questions or concerns in the future, please feel free to start a new chat with us, we are happy to help!
Cool. Thanks.

No worries, and I do appreciate your understanding and efforts. I'll close our conversation now, to give way to other Hosts and guests in need.

Have a wonderful afternoon and enjoy the rest of your day!

Can you describe your issue in a few sentences? This will help our team understand what’s going on. 

Please don’t include sensitive info like credit card numbers.
I received a review that contains factually inaccurate information, which I can prove.
To provide the most helpful info, could you let us know which reservation you need help with?
Okay, it seems like you want to remove a review. Before we connect you, does this info solve your issue?
How would you like to connect with us?
Okay, I’ve sent your message. The person who responds will be able to see everything you’ve already shared. Feel free to add more details to help our team understand and resolve your issue faster.
If you leave this message thread, you can get back to it from your Airbnb inbox.
Thanks for your message—we’ll reply as soon as a member of our team becomes available.

Hi Johan,

I'm Zoya S. with Airbnb and I help to support our Host community I hope you’re doing well!

As we have checked and found that you have contacted us in regards with the reservation HM248JEJ9X and wanted to dispute the review left by the Guest Elle.

As I have checked we have found that the review is valid as the Guest is shared her experience however if you have any evidence you can share, and we will check as per our policy whether we can remove the review ?

Regards,
Airbnb Support
Hi Zoya, the client makes false statements in the review, w.r.t. to parking.
"Parking is extra too although it lists parking on the amenities without mentioning it’s extra."
On the message received upon booking and 24 hours beforehand it states : " Secure covered parking can be arranged at reception at R125 per night".
So the content of the review contains factually inaccurate information.
Please review the message she received upon booking.
Hello?
I believe this review violates your content policy.
"Listings and profiles that provide fraudulent, false, misleading, or deceptive information"
Please allow us sometime to go ahead and investigate and I will update you.

Hello Johan,

As you may recall, we did point out that we can't remove, edit, or censor Elle’s review. That’s because it doesn’t meet the criteria for removal in our Review Policy.

We're only in a position to remove reviews that meet those criteria, and we can’t make any exceptions. We know how much you care about your reputation as a Host and how frustrating it can be to get a review that doesn’t match your expectations.
We honestly reviewed your review carefully, with our top-notch experts, and we want to explain why we can’t take down their review and why that’s actually a good thing for you and our community.

I honestly did my best for an hour trying to see if this review violates our policies or not. I've done my best to create a detailed report about it; however, despite my sincere and good intentions, the request was declined, and I'll try to explain the reason behind this decision provided by our higher department expertise.

You see, we value authenticity above all else. We don’t want to silence anyone’s voice or censor their opinions. That’s why we’ve updated our policies to only remove reviews that break our guidelines. We think this makes our community more transparent and trustworthy. Don’t you agree?

We get feedback from people who are not happy with the reviews they get quite often. We hear things like "That's not true." or "That's a lie." or "That's unfair.", and it's hard for us too, because the truth isn't simple, right?

You see, the truth is not a simple thing. It doesn't have a single color. It’s more like a rainbow of colors and shades. It depends on who you are, where you come from, what you’ve experienced, and how you view the world. The truth can vary for everyone, and even change over time. It’s like looking at a painting everyone can have their own interpretation and opinion.

You can learn more about this in our Help Center:
 
airbnb.com/help/article/548

Best,
Airbnb Support
This is a black and white case of "Paif parking on premises" that she said was not stated....
*Paid

I cannot be a more clear cut blatant lie, unless your Amenities message is not clear. I discussed it with my mother who is a scolar and she says your amenities message is the problem and the client did not uinderstand that Paid parking on premises means she has to pay....but that is your messaging, not mine. I stand by the fact that she makes a statement that is factually untrue, especially if read with the messaging provided to her upon booking.
"Secure covered parking can be arranged at reception at R125 per night."

As we have checked the Guest have mentioned that she had to pay extra for parking hence on your listing it is mention Paid parking on premises which is the same both are the same thing hence the Guest have shared her experience also to censor the review we check multiple factors therefore as I have tried to check whether this review violates our policy or not. 

We found out that on the norms of Airbnb this review is purely what the Guest experience is as she has given you 4 star therefore we are unable to remove the review.

Regards,
Airbnb Support

Okay I'm going to move that listing to booking-com and remove it from Airbnb. Also, if the Guest have shared their experience then you to have the option to respond to the review and leave your experience with the Guest.  I hope that you understand that if there was anything that I could do, I could have done it right away without any hesitation.	
	
My goal is to make sure that you get the best experience without compromising the policies we have in place. I understand that it's a bit disheartening at this point, however, we are bound to abide by certain regulations.	
	
Please feel free to respond if there are questions.	

Stay safe and take care.

1937550707.message:
Hi Johan. ich hoffe, es geht Ihnen gut.
This is Mohamed M. from Airbnb's community support team.  
I am contacting you regarding the reservation of Isolde, who will check in on 4 December.
Have you told the guest that she must cancel the reservation?
Please let me know if there is a problem with your listing.

Hi, yes, I was still setting up the pricing when she booked, it is a new listing, and I hadn't gotten to December, wheb the booking came through... Auto accept was also on, which I have switched off.. The rate at which she booked is not acceptable by the property owner... Apologies.

No problem, I understand the situation, but I must tell you that if I cancel your reservation you will be charged a cancellation fee, your calendar will be blocked and your chance of becoming a Super Host will be affected.
I know....I may have to pay the difference, but the owner is overseas and I will chat to him in Oct, when he is back...
OK, but are you able to give me confirmation whether you agree to cancel the reservation or not? because the guest is waiting to get resolution

I'm not in a position to make that call, as I'm not the property owner. This client understands the reason why she got quoted 1/3 of a market related price. I cannot resolve this without your guests cancellation.

Hello Johan

I hope you are doing well.
Can you give me a specific timeframe to respond to me on this matter?
I will close this case now and when you are able to respond to us and confirm, you can contact us again.

Hi Johan,

I hope you're doing well.

This is to let you know that I have conveyed your concern about the listing to the Guest and the Guest has gone ahead and canceled the reservation. I hope you can see the status as well. So, you can ease with regard to the reservation and cancellation.

Thank you for being a part of Airbnb Community, wish you happy hosting.

Regards,
Airbnb Support.

Hi Johan. I would love to stay from 28 Dec to 3 January.
Please can you let me know about the mattress as I have a sensitive back. Thank you
Hi Cheryl, thank you for the enquiry....
I'm trying to find out the exact specifications for the mattress in 501....
Just have a 13 day booking in 501 currently....will ask housekeeping to take a picture when they clean the room....

Rest Assured's Heritage MQ10 model is exceptionally popular in the hospitality industry. The combination of luxurious soft foam and ultra-tough coils create the perfect sleeping partner.

The Heritage Bonnell Coil is constructed using the bonnell hourglass-shaped coil (six-turn) - This ensures equal distribution of tension throughout the entire spring unit, while each coil is double-knotted, top and bottom to increase strength and durability.
Coils are double-tempered for extra durability and offer more stable support for heavier weight - perfect for persons with a larger build or those who require firm support.
The six-turn coil has 33% more working wire than a 5-turn, this allows more support and interaction with the body, thus alleviating joint pain.

A reinforced Hip Zone offers additional support - 6 high-density foam bars in the middle third of the mattress prevent and absorb any vibration between the coils and provide extra support in the hip area.

Firm, reconstituted foam, high density foam and fibre surround both sides of this dual sided mattress to provide better surface comfort and an unmatched luxurious feel.

The Heritage MQ10 mattress is upholstered in a soft touch knitted ticking and micro-quilted fibre and foam.

I have tried the mattresses myself, and I also have a sensitive spine, I can recommend these, although my personal preference is still the Simmons & Cloud Nine - but their are very expensive. Please advise if you have anymore questions. Thanks, Johan.

Hi Johan, I spoke to the receptionist and understand that this is a recurring dilemma and feel that it is not appropriate that this  information was not provided on the site nor with check in. Advertising a pool with no pool access is not fair and is false advertisement.

We pay R12k a month for pool access, there is clearly a problem with the 6th floor entity... Which we will address as a matter of urgency. This is with the TPF director currently. Pool do need to be serviced from time to time as with any hotel...

I believe that the issue should not be of any concern to the guests however we should be informed of such dilemmas so we have the courtesy of choosing to book or not and getting what we paid for. My partner and I booked the place with the deciding factor of the pool but did not get to experience it as it was told it was closed after we had prepared ourselves for a swim. Advertising a pool with no pool access is unfortunately misleading and false advertisement

As stated earlier, I did not know the pool was closed. If you accuse me of false advertising again I will brief my legal consultant this afternoon and start proceedings first thing on Monday. We pay for pool access, why it was denied I will find out in die course. I consider this discussion as closed.

You booked out of office ours and I advised you that I could not allocate this booking last night... Please contact airbnb support to cancel and request a full refund which I will approved when they contact me...
Johan, please sort this out. You can cancel the booking on your end!
I personally incur 80% penalties then.....which is not a fair outcome.

From the Airbnb app:

We will impose fees subject to a minimum cancellation fee of $50 USD and a maximum cancellation fee of $1,000 USD. The fee is based on the reservation amount and when the reservation is canceled:

If the reservation is canceled 48 hours or less before check-in, or after check-in, the fee is 50% of the reservation amount for the nights not stayed If the reservation is canceled more than 48 hours, and 30 days or less, before check-in, the fee is 25% of the reservation amount

If the reservation is canceled more than 30 days before check-in, the fee is 10% of the reservation amount

When calculating cancellation fees, the reservation amount includes the base rate, cleaning fee, and any pet fees, but excludes taxes and guest fees. If the calculated cancellation fee is less than $50 USD, it will be adjusted up to $50 USD, and if the calculated fee is more than $1,000 USD, it will be adjusted down to $1,000 USD.
As opposed to losing half of the booking value to AirBnB, if you are unwilling to request cancellation, I propose that I pay you the full amount received when I receive it...which should be R3,041.32
If I cancel I will not get a full refund and loose my service fee.
I pay 50% of your booking fee....
You will be charge 25% not 80%. That’s unfortunate but I didn’t make the airbnb rules
Check-in is in more than 48h
If you cancel before 1500
R882.93 ZAR will be deducted from your next payout
My booking was R4000, do the math
If you cancel and I agree to a full refund you lose nothing...but nevermind.....I'll cancel, and please just never contact me again in any form.

So, you are offering several units that aren’t available, confirmed a booking for another unit that isn’t available, asked guests to cancel against Airbnb rules, and didn’t apologize for anything. You’ve wasted my time, and I have no place to stay during the marathon when everything is booked and I also need to chase my refund. But you are the victim? 👍🏻

The unit was available on the opera system, but booking-Com had booked all the studios, they only get allocated the next morning. I had to go go the director of the Barracks to find out what is going on... Happens when the hotel is full... I'd like to apologise it's clearly a glitch....

Changing your reservation dates on the AirBnB app/browser:
1. Tap Trips and select the trip you want to change.
2. Under Reservation details, tap Change reservation.
3. Change the dates of your stay and tap Save.
4. Review your changes and then tap Send request.
5. Note: Payment needs to be received by 10h30 for same-day extentions.

We understand that cancelations are sometimes unavoidable due to circumstances outside the Host’s control. If a Host has to cancel for a valid reason, we’ll work with them and help their guests find another place to stay, without the Host incurring cancelation fees or other consequences for canceling. 

Valid cancelation reasons include:

1. Circumstances beyond the Host’s control, such as major damage to a listing, emergency repairs (like a gas leak or a burst pipe), or serious personal illness that prevents hosting
2. Proof that a guest intends to break one of the house rules included in the Listing details, have an unauthorized party or otherwise violate our Party and Events Policy

Dear Sharon, the Barracks use the Rest Assured's Heritage MQ10 model for all rooms. It is exceptionally popular in the hospitality industry. The combination of luxurious soft foam and ultra-tough coils create the perfect sleeping partner.

The Heritage Bonnell Coil is constructed using the bonnell hourglass-shaped coil (six-turn) - This ensures equal distribution of tension throughout the entire spring unit, while each coil is double-knotted, top and bottom to increase strength and durability.

Coils are double-tempered for extra durability and offer more stable support for heavier weight - perfect for persons with a larger build or those who require firm support.
The six-turn coil has 33% more working wire than a 5-turn, this allows more support and interaction with the body, thus alleviating joint pain.

A reinforced Hip Zone offers additional support - 6 high-density foam bars in the middle third of the mattress prevent and absorb any vibration between the coils and provide extra support in the hip area.

Firm, reconstituted foam, high density foam and fibre surround both sides of this dual sided mattress to provide better surface comfort and an unmatched luxurious feel.

The Heritage MQ10 mattress is upholstered in a soft touch knitted ticking and micro-quilted fibre and foam.

Hi Johan,

The issues above can however impact your Airbnb rating for less accommodating guests that could write poor reviews because of these issues.
Regards,
Jacques
Just checked the photos, 502 wasn't nearly as nice as 303 that I booked. It is also much smaller...

Morning Jacques. My sincere apalogies that your / Megan's experenience was not, what you expected. Unfortunaltely it happens that when the Barracks is fully booked  that they have to move shorter bookings and longer duration bookings between rooms as to facilitate optimal utilisation. 

This is standard hotel practice. The advent of AirBnB, where clients choose their own room, obviously provides a bit of a hurdle to the above. I have repeatedly taken this up with the management company, but with AirBnB bookings being dwarfed by booking-com bookings, they are following the path which gives them best utilisation. 

When comparing the price between booking-com and airnb it is evident that they make 20-40% more revenue on a booking-com booking than the airbnb's. This time of year finding a room in CPT is a feat, and adopting the hotel mindset, their thinking was that 502 is an upgrade for 303, as their system tells them that, notwithstanding that 303 is a corner unit with a lovely view off the balcony. I will continue to push for not moving my clients, as they will point out the ARPU differential between the clients. 

I hope that you can see the factors at play above, and trust that you can see fit to not penalise me, for a bigger ongoing struggle. Your booking is appreciated and I hope you will trust me again in the future. Many Thanks, Johan.

Hi Johan,
No need to apologise at all. My review is very positive as none of the issues raised are as a result of anything you did or didn't do. I sent the message to you in private as I have stayed in serviced apartment blocks before where simmilar things happen and owners are not always aware of it.
Thank you for the response, I will most definitely book your apartment again.
Regards,
Jacques

I will be calling you now to discuss your concern over the phone.

Thanks for taking my call earlier, it was a pleasure speaking with you.

I understand hos distressing the situation can be knowing that you had a double-booking as to why you have to cancel this reservation HMC2P9NZST. We normally impose penalties to this type of cancellation, but for one-time courtesy, we have waived it here. There will be no cancellation fee; calendar is set to open so make sure to block it right away; and the qualification rate for the SuperHost status will not be affected. Please know as well that you will not be getting a payout.

Once again, please make sure that you will be able to fix this issue on your end so that you will not be going to experience this again.

I'm glad that I was able to help. For now, I will be closing this ticket but always remember that you have a friend here in Airbnb and if you need any help or if you have any questions, you may contact us again through our contact support page below, or you can call us anytime, and we are more than happy to help.

Hi, Ismael, all 55 rooms have the same mattresses that is the standard for the hotel industry...

Dear Ismaël, the Barracks use the Rest Assured's Heritage MQ10 model for all rooms. It is exceptionally popular in the hospitality industry. The combination of luxurious soft foam and ultra-tough coils create the perfect sleeping partner.

The Heritage Bonnell Coil is constructed using the bonnell hourglass-shaped coil (six-turn) - This ensures equal distribution of tension throughout the entire spring unit, while each coil is double-knotted, top and bottom to increase strength and durability.

Coils are double-tempered for extra durability and offer more stable support for heavier weight - perfect for persons with a larger build or those who require firm support.
The six-turn coil has 33% more working wire than a 5-turn, this allows more support and interaction with the body, thus alleviating joint pain.

A reinforced Hip Zone offers additional support - 6 high-density foam bars in the middle third of the mattress prevent and absorb any vibration between the coils and provide extra support in the hip area.

Firm, reconstituted foam, high density foam and fibre surround both sides of this dual sided mattress to provide better surface comfort and an unmatched luxurious feel.

The Heritage MQ10 mattress is upholstered in a soft touch knitted ticking and micro-quilted fibre and foam.
